song.title: Jesus, O Living Word of God
song.lyrics:
[V1] .D A Bm Jesus, O living Word of God, . D G Wash me and cleanse me with Your blood, . D A D A So You can speak to me. .D A Bm Just let me hear Your words of grace. . D G Just let me see Your radiant face, . D A G D Beholding constantly.|| . A Bm D Jesus, living Word, .G D A D A My heart thirsts for Thee. .D A Bm D Of Thee I’d eat and drink, . G D A G D Enjoy Thee thoroughly.
[V2] Jesus, most precious One to me, I want to seek You constantly, So You can spread through me. I would just call upon Your name, Open to You, I have no shame, Loving You, Jesus Lord.|| Jesus, Precious One, Be so real to me. You are all I want. I open wide to Thee. .. .. .. .. .. .. .. .. --- [V3] Jesus, O living One in me, Open my eyes that I might see All that You are to me. Just let me enter in Your heart, Never from You would I depart, Loving You constantly.|| Jesus, Living One, Flood me thoroughly. Take my willing heart, And overcome in me.
[V4] Lord, I want You to have Your way. Save me from being Satan's prey. I am believing You. All I can give to You, my Lord, Is my whole being, love outpoured. Lord, I belong to You.|| Jesus, faithful God, Gain us through and through. Use us thoroughly To see Your purpose through.
